Event: Palace Hustle
Event Date: 20/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T120
Palace Hustle Totem

Once in a while the unit disarms all enemy units with less than 50% health for 3 sec and deals 350000 physical damage to them. The unit also removes armor from all enemy units with more than 50% health for 3 sec and deals 350000 magic damage to them. The units whose armor has been removed lose 50% armor stats and can't use armor abilities. Disarmed enemy units can't use weapon abilities.

Requirements: 90

User rating: item not rated yet
